testcase.name: sign_in_with_known_email_returns_auth_payload_with_token
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-06T17:56:40.874-05:00 INFO 15805 --- [luxe-guest-service] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.luxe.guest.resolver.GuestDataFetcherTest]: GuestDataFetcherTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-06T17:56:40.875-05:00 INFO 15805 --- [luxe-guest-service] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.luxe.guest.GuestApplication for test class com.luxe.guest.resolver.GuestDataFetcherTest

testcase.name: guest_query_returns_seeded_profile
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-06T17:56:41.111-05:00 ERROR 15805 --- [luxe-guest-service] [ main] g.d.e.DefaultDataFetcherExceptionHandler : Exception while executing data fetcher for /guest: Authentication required
